title: ferray-strings: no string comparison operations (equal, not_equal, less, greater)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's char module provides equal, not_equal, greater_equal, less_equal, greater, less for elementwise string comparison. These return boolean arrays. ferray-strings has no comparison functions. You can't compare two string arrays elementwise to get a boolean mask. These are needed for filtering, sorting verification, and conditional string operations.
